validation_queries.error_message: Did not find Xgmi data in amd-smi metrics
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE symbol LIKE 'Xgmi%'

validation_queries.error_message: Did not find Pcie data in amd-smi metrics

validation_queries.description: Check for amd-smi xgmi link speed samples
validation_queries.error_message: Less than expected number of captured amd-smi xgmi link speed samples!
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_xgmi_link_speed'
